name: YouTube Explainer
description: Standard explainer/tutorial format for YouTube videos

structure.description: Grab attention with a question, surprising fact, or promise
structure.example: Have you ever wondered how [topic] actually works? Today I'm going to show you the secret behind it.

structure.description: Introduce yourself and what the video will cover
structure.example: I'm [Your Name], and in this video, we're going to break down [topic] into simple, actionable steps.

structure.description: Break down the main points with clear explanations

structure.example: Let me show you what this looks like in practice...
So to recap, here are the three main things to remember about [topic]...

structure.description: Tell viewers what to do next
structure.example: If you found this helpful, hit that like button and subscribe for more content like this!

tips: Add chapter markers for longer videos
